title: Homer is a small city on Kachemak Bay, on Alaska's Kenai Peninsula — low-tide mudflats
description: Low-tide mudflats at Homer exposing dark sand and gravel ripples with the Kenai Mountains on the far shore. Illustrates the extreme tidal range (often 25+ ft) in Cook Inlet and Kachemak Bay.
alt: Dark mudflats and receding water at low tide in front of the Kenai Mountains near Homer, Alaska
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services (highsm 72736) and visually confirmed
